title: Beyond Blocks
description: Beyond Blocks is a carefully crafted collection of 50+ mods that will transform your Minecraft 1.20 experience.
body:
> Are you ready to embark on the ultimate Minecraft adventure? Beyond Blocks is a carefully crafted collection of 50+ mods that will transform your Minecraft 1.20 experience into an epic journey filled with exploration, tech, magic and epic boss fight.

Modpack Contents :

*This list is subject to change in the future as older mods are adapted to version 1.20 and as I come across fantastic mods to include. Feel free to suggest mods that you would like to add to the modpack.* ### 📚 Mods : | Name | Description | |---|---| | [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) | A space mod with a focus on technology, travel, and exploration. | | [AE2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) | Adds advanced machinery for item storage. | | [Alex's Caves](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-caves) | Adds new cave systems and exploration opportunities. | | [Alex's Mobs](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-mobs) | Introduces a variety of new creatures to the game. | | [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) | Provides additional information about food-related stats. | | [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts) | Makes exploration more rewarding by adding various powerful items. | | [Chunk Loaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunk-loaders) | Keeps chunks loaded for efficient automation. | | [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps) | Drops experience orbs in clumps for performance improvements. | | [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked) | Customizes your character's appearance without affecting stats. | | [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) | Aesthetic Technology that empowers the Player | | [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) | Adds dungeons, taverns, and other structures. | | [Elytra Slot](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-slot) | Adds accessory support to the elytra so you can fly and wear chest armor at the same time. | | [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) | Using async path-tracing to skip rendering Block/Entities that are not visible. | | [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) | A modern rendering engine for Minecraft which greatly improves performance. | | [FallingTree](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree) | Break down your trees by only cutting one piece of it. | | [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) | Expands farming with new crops and meals. | | [Ice and Fire](https://github.com/AlexModGuy/Ice_and_Fire/releases) | Introduces dragons and mythical creatures. | | [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) | Adds immersive air travel to your world. | | [Immersive Engineering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering) | Retrofuturism, industry and multiblocks! | | [Immediately Fast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) | Improves the immediate mode rendering performance. | | [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next) | Organizes your inventory profiles efficiently. | | [IronChests](https://modrinth.com/mod/ironchests) | Upgrades storage capacity with iron chests. | | [Iron Ender Chests](https://modrinth.com/mod/iron-ender-chests) | Upgrades storage capacity of ender chests. | | [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) | Shows information about what you are looking at. | | [JEI (Just Enough Items)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) | Displays crafting and smelting recipes in-game. | | [L_Ender's Cataclysm](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/l_ender-s-cataclysm) | Adds difficult dungeons, challenging boss-fights, and powerful items. | | [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) | Introduces advanced machinery and automation. | | [Mekanism Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-additions) | Expands the Mekanism mod with new features. | | [Mekanism Generators](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-generators) | Adds power generation options to Mekanism. | | [Mekanism Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-tools) | Enhances the toolset within Mekanism. | | [Mmmmmmmmmmmm](https://modrinth.com/mod/mmmmmmmmmmmm) | Target Dummy that shows damage dealt. | | [Oculus](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus) | A modern shaders mod. | | [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) | Provides in-game guidebooks for mod information. | | [Plushie](https://modrinth.com/mod/plushie) | Adds adorable plushies for decoration. | | [RightClickHarvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/rightclickharvest) | Simplifies farming by allowing right-click harvesting. | | [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords) | Adds new swords and combat options. | | [Small Ships](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships) | Vanilla-friendly Ships for Minecraft. | | [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) | Decoration mod. | | [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) | Terralith takes Minecraft's 1.18 massive world generation overhaul and turns it up to eleven. | | [Trash Cans](https://modrinth.com/mod/trash-cans) | Add trash cans. | | [Travel Anchors](https://modrinth.com/mod/travel-anchors) | Adds Travel Anchors from EnderIO. | | [When Dungeons Arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise) | Adds various elegant -and likely hostile- roguelike dungeons. | | [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) | Displays a minimap of nearby terrain, players, and entities, and allows waypoint use. | | [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) | Adds a full-screen world map. |

### 🔗 Dependencies: - [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - [Botarium](https://modrinth.com/mod/botarium) - [Citadel](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/citadel) - [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - [Moonlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/moonlight) - [Resourceful Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-config) - [Resourceful Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-lib) - [Terrablender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender) ### 🎨 Resource Pack: - [Reimagined GUI dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimaginedguidark) - [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) ### 🔆 Shaders : - [Complementary-Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
